stages.label: Control plane
stages.summary: No live-runner daemon URL is configured for this data plane.
stages.title: Daemon control plane is not configured

stages.label: Host process
stages.summary: The host is reachable but this bot has no active process. Run roll call for a fresh start offer.
stages.title: Bot process is not running

stages.label: Broker proof
stages.next_step: Inspect broker/account safety evidence before any trading action.
stages.title: Broker safety is not paper-only

stages.label: Account safety
stages.next_step: Refresh Account Truth from broker evidence before treating submit readiness as safe.
stages.summary: No cached Account Truth projection is available for this account.
stages.title: Account Truth snapshot is unavailable

stages.label: Account owner
stages.next_step: Wait for AccountOwner accepting/generation proof before expecting submit readiness to clear.
stages.title: AccountOwner not proven accepting

stages.label: Reconciliation
stages.next_step: Manually verify IBKR first; then start/redeploy the bot so runtime reconciliation can produce a receipt.
stages.summary: Reconciliation state is NOT_AVAILABLE; runtime reconciliation cannot run until a bot process is bound.
stages.title: Runtime reconciliation is waiting for a live bot process

stages.label: Trading session
stages.next_step: Wait for the strategy session window before expecting submit readiness to clear.
stages.title: Trading session not accepting strategy activity

stages.label: Runtime evidence
stages.summary: No child runtime freshness envelope is currently bound to this instance.
stages.title: Runtime evidence is not bound

blockers.detail: No cached Account Truth projection is available for this account.
blockers.headline: Account not proven

connection_condition.remediation: Manually verify IBKR account state, then start or redeploy the bot so a child runtime can record fresh broker evidence.
connection_condition.summary: The global data-plane broker may be connected, but this bot has no live runtime bound to publish per-bot broker proof.
connection_condition.title: No live bot runtime is bound

crash_recovery_override.body: Recording recovery evidence clears the crash-retired start gate and lets this bot run again.
crash_recovery_override.consequence: Only confirm after verifying in IBKR that the broker account is flat with no open orders. This writes audited safety evidence.
crash_recovery_override.title: Confirm the broker account is flat

mark_poisoned.body: Flagging this instance as POISONED is irreversible: the current run can never resume on its run_id.
mark_poisoned.consequence: Recovery requires a fresh deployment with a new run_id after the account is reconciled.
mark_poisoned.title: Mark this run POISONED

remove_bot.body: Remove hides this bot from the catalog with a soft-delete marker.
remove_bot.consequence: The underlying audit files stay on disk, but this bot will no longer appear in the active bot list.
remove_bot.title: Remove bot

retire_replace.body: Retire & Replace permanently retires this bot instance, then opens replacement deploy with the current lineage.
retire_replace.consequence: Confirm only after verifying the broker account is flat with no open orders.
retire_replace.title: Retire & Replace

host_process.notice: The host is reachable but this bot has no active process. Run roll call for a fresh start offer.

run_signal.detail: The host is reachable but this bot has no active process. Run roll call for a fresh start offer.
run_signal.title: Bot process is not running

submit_readiness.explanation: The backend cannot prove the broker/session/reconciliation evidence required for a safe submit.
submit_readiness.label: Broker state unproven

additional_attention_groups.headline: Broker safety is not paper-only
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Inspect broker/account safety evidence before any trading action.

additional_attention_groups.explanation: The global data-plane broker may be connected, but this bot has no live runtime bound to publish per-bot broker proof.
additional_attention_groups.headline: No live bot runtime is bound
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Start a bot process only after IBKR positions/executions are manually verified; broker proof cannot refresh while no runtime is bound.

additional_attention_groups.headline: Submission capability is blocked
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Inspect the submit guard evidence before attempting another order.

additional_attention_groups.headline: AccountOwner not proven accepting
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Wait for AccountOwner accepting/generation proof before expecting submit readiness to clear.

additional_attention_groups.explanation: Reconciliation state is NOT_AVAILABLE; runtime reconciliation cannot run until a bot process is bound.
additional_attention_groups.headline: Runtime reconciliation is waiting for a live bot process
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Manually verify IBKR first; then start/redeploy the bot so runtime reconciliation can produce a receipt.

additional_attention_groups.explanation: No cached Account Truth projection is available for this account.
additional_attention_groups.headline: Account Truth snapshot is unavailable
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Refresh Account Truth from broker evidence before treating submit readiness as safe.

additional_attention_groups.explanation: Host process is IDLE; live-only commands cannot execute until a bot process is started.
additional_attention_groups.headline: No live runtime is bound
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Use this as context for the blocked broker/reconciliation proofs, not as a separate broker problem.

additional_attention_groups.headline: Trading session not accepting strategy activity
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Wait for the strategy session window before expecting submit readiness to clear.

trader_guidance.explanation: The backend cannot prove the broker/session/reconciliation facts needed before a submit.
trader_guidance.headline: Broker state is not proven enough to submit.

proof_lines.detail: Account safety proof is not recorded. The global data-plane broker may be connected, but this bot has no live runtime bound to publish per-bot broker proof.
proof_lines.label: Broker
proof_lines.message: Broker proof is not available yet.

proof_lines.detail: The backend cannot prove the broker/session/reconciliation evidence required for a safe submit. 9 blocking proofs still need attention.
proof_lines.label: Trade submit

proof_lines.detail: No AccountOwner artifact is available for this bot.
proof_lines.label: Account owner

proof_lines.detail: No reconciliation claim has been produced for this run.
proof_lines.label: Reconciliation

proof_lines.detail: No child runtime is currently bound to this instance.
proof_lines.label: Runtime
proof_lines.message: No live runtime is bound yet.

trader_guidance.risk_explanation: Reconnect or reconcile until the broker evidence is fresh and explicit.
trader_guidance.risk_headline: Do not treat stale or missing broker evidence as live truth
